title: Cetus - Rekt
relevance_summary: Arithmetic overflow leading to massive liquidity minting and subsequent draining of funds via flash loans

prevention.rule: Block any tx that borrows a flash loan and immediately mints liquidity in the same transaction

red_flags: flash loan followed by liquidity minting in the same transaction
summary: Attackers exploited a flaw in Cetus Protocol's get_liquidity_from_a formula to mint massive liquidity positions with a small flash loan, draining $223 million from Sui's largest DEX.
